channel.title: Tech Policy on Rafelia's AI LOLs
channel.description: Recent content in Tech Policy on Rafelia's AI LOLs

item.title: 🇫🇷 Macron Wants Europe to “Plug, Baby, Plug” into AI! 🤖🔌
item.description: Macron just dropped €109 billion on AI and told Europe to wake up! Less red tape, more power, and a global AI pledge incoming.
